verbGlossary.GEOCODED TO: {source}is mapped to the target project address attribute (e.g., project site geocoded to {target} address)
verbGlossary.BOUNDED BY: {source}'s physical extent is defined by {target} area attribute (e.g., project site bounded by site area)
verbGlossary.SITED WITHIN: {source} location falls within {target} attribute (e.g., project site sited within the climate zone or seismic design category)
verbGlossary.MEASURED AS: {source} dimension contributes to {target} building attribute measurement (e.g., building measured as gross building area)
verbGlossary.COUNTED TOWARD: {source} instances are tallied to produce {target} count attribute (e.g., floor levels counted toward number of stories above grade)
verbGlossary.CLASSIFIED BY: {source}'s use or construction classification is determined by {target} attribute (e.g., room classified by occupancy group)
verbGlossary.DEFINES: {source} establishes the upper boundary that determines {target} dimension attribute (e.g., roof level defines building height)
verbGlossary.CONSTRAINED BY: {source} layout is restricted by {target} site constraint attribute
verbGlossary.SEQUENCED BY: {source} work zone is organized according to {target}d construction attribute
verbGlossary.GOVERNED BY: {source} compartment or space design is determined by {target} attribute
verbGlossary.CONFIGURED FOR: {source} commissioning zone is set up to satisfy {target}
verbGlossary.ALIGNED WITH: {source} grid reference aligns with {target} column and bay layout
verbGlossary.ROLLED INTO: {source}-level completion metric aggregates into {target}-level completion attribute
verbGlossary.AGGREGATED INTO: {source}-level quality or safety metric sums into {target}-level density attribute
verbGlossary.SEGMENTED BY: {source}-level metric is broken down by {target} attribute for cross-project comparison
